entities.name: Jesus Christ

attributes.description: Son of God, is God and Man, Perfect God, perfect Man
attributes.role: Suffered for salvation, descended into hell, rose again third day

entities.raw_quote: our Lord Jesus Christ, the Son of God, is God and Man. Perfect God, and perfect Man

entities.name: Pater Noster

attributes.content: Our Father, who art in heaven...

entities.raw_quote: Pater noster, qui es in celis, sanctiﬁcetur nomen tuum. Adveniat regnum tuum.

entities.name: Alpha and Omega

attributes.description: Deus omnipotens, beginning of all things without beginning

entities.raw_quote: Alpha et Ω, Deus omnipotens, principium omnium rerum sine principio, ﬁnis sine ﬁne

entities.name: Cherubim
entities.raw_quote: cherubyn et seraphyn, vos suppliciter rogamus

entities.name: Holy Spirit

attributes.function: Illuminate soul, cleanse, restore all things

entities.raw_quote: illuminate my soul with the ray of your most Holy Spirit

entities.name: Prayer 18 (XVIII)
entities.raw_quote: Lux mundi, Deus inmense, pater eternitatis... mitte manum tuam et tange animam meam

entities.name: Prayer 19 (XIX)

attributes.function: Instructions for modifying petitions for spirits, knowledge, or consecration

entities.raw_quote: If however you wish to obtain some knowledge, or to consecrate the book, or to invoke spiritus

entities.name: Vision of God

attributes.goal: Achieve divine vision while living, face to face

entities.raw_quote: valeam ad facialem tui, Deus eterne, visionem virtute tui sanctissimi Spiritus

summary: This chunk contains theological creeds regarding the nature of Christ, followed by a series of prayers (XIV through XXV) including invocations to divine names and angels. It provides specific ritual instructions on how to modify petitions for different purposes such as calling spirits, obtaining knowledge, or consecrating books.
key_passages: Pater noster, qui es in celis, sanctiﬁcetur nomen tuum. Adveniat regnum tuum.
Alpha et Ω, Deus omnipotens, principium omnium rerum sine principio, ﬁnis sine ﬁne
Michael, id est medicina Dei, Raphael, fortitudo Dei, Gabriel, ardens
